allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"total={d['total']}, hasMore={d['hasMore']}, count={len\(d['items']\)}\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; pkgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name']\) for p in pkgs if 'sqlite' in p['name'].lower\(\) or 'libsql' in p['name'].lower\(\) or 'better' in p['name'].lower\(\)]")
